steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice emphasizes the location of the figures in The Space in Which We Travel. The notes say the two young girls float "in the center of the canvas" — that spatial detail is what you need to match.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — size of the figures: describes how large they appear, not where they are. ✗
  • Choice B — mood of the scene: conveys feeling or atmosphere, not location. ✗
  • Choice C — 'in the center of the canvas': directly names a position on the canvas — a location detail. ✓
  • Choice D — color: describes a visual quality, not where the figures are placed. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
